summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bhaiya AI mentor platform - all backend APIs and frontend pages working correctly
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (GET /api/) returns 'Bhaiya AI API' message
All authentication endpoints working (POST /api/auth/session, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/logout)
Chat endpoint (POST /api/chat) successfully integrates with Claude AI
Chat history endpoint (GET /api/chat/history) returns message history
Avatar endpoints (GET /api/avatar, PUT /api/avatar) manage avatar configuration
Goals CRUD operations (POST /api/goals, GET /api/goals, PUT /api/goals/{id}, DELETE /api/goals/{id})
Landing page loads with correct hero text 'Stop guessing. Start improving.'
Landing page displays 6 feature cards as expected
Dashboard page loads with authentication and displays action cards (Study, Health, Talk, Call Bhaiya)
Chat page loads with input field and send button, displays conversation history
Call page loads with voice interface and call controls
Avatar customization page loads with personality sliders and appearance options
